title: Reactome API Vocabulary
description: Terms, concepts, and data model vocabulary extracted from Reactome Content Service and Analysis Service APIs

events.description: Reactome Data: Queries related to events

participants.description: Reactome Data: Queries related to participants

discover.description: Reactome Data: Search engines discovery schema

Interactor.description: List of Interactors that interacts with the given accession.

Interactor.acc.description: This is the interactor accession (or identifier).

Interactor.accURL.description: This represents the URL for given accession.

Interactor.alias.description: This is the Gene name of the given accession.

Interactor.evidencesURL.description: This represents the URL for the given interactions identifiers.

Interactor.id.description: This is an auto increment counter which represents an unique number for the interaction.

Interactor.score.description: This represents the confidence value (score) of an interaction.

InteractorEntity.description: This is the list of entities which have been requested.

InteractorEntity.acc.description: This is the interactor accession (or identifier).

InteractorEntity.count.description: This is the number of interactions for the given accession.

InteractorEntity.interactors.description: List of Interactors that interacts with the given accession.

Interactors.entities.description: This is the list of entities which have been requested.

Interactors.resource.description: This is the resource where interactors have been queried.

report.description: Retrieves report files in PDF format

download.description: Methods to download different views of a result
